arts.ttl: Millwall defender Ryan Leonard on triggering contract extension
arts.sum: This year I got myself in the team and was just really enjoying playing and not worrying about how many games I’d played or how my body was feeling. “It was after 25 starts that I think I triggered it,” Leonard, right, told the South London Press .

arts.ttl: 'I could have said no, it was my decision' - Selvik on joining Watford
arts.sum: The Norwegian goalkeeper had only been at Udinese a few weeks before moving to Hertfordshire, and is currently on a run of three successive clean sheets.

arts.ttl: Preview: Watford vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Watford and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
